phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria del Duomo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah del DUO-moh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In the square, on the left.

responses.english: In the square, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso per le terrazze, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so per leh tehr-RAT-seh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Ascensore a destra, scale a sinistra.
likely_response.pronunciation: ah-shehn-SOH-reh AH DEH-strah SKAH-leh AH see-NEE-strah
likely_response.translation_en: Elevator on right, stairs on left.

responses.english: Elevator on right, stairs on left.
responses.phonetic: ah-shehn-SOH-reh AH DEH-strah SKAH-leh AH see-NEE-strah
responses.french: Ascensore a destra, scale a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto completo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-lyet-toh kom-PLEH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare la visita online, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh lah vee-ZEE-tah on-LINE, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un deposito bagagli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee, per fah-VOH-reh
